function.name: is_valid_time
function.description: Check if a time string is valid in a given format.
function.long_description: Validates whether a time string matches a specified format and returns parsed time components if valid.
example_user_queries: Is 23:45 a valid time in %H:%M format?
Tell me if 07:30 PM is valid using %I:%M %p.
Validate the time string 24:00 with format %H:%M.
Check if 13:75 is a valid time.
